decision: Renderer exposes pure `render(items: list[SummarizedItem], *, lookback_days: int) -> str` behind a new DigestRenderer port; returns Markdown string
reasoning: S4 exports list[SummarizedItem] via summarize_items(); user clarification Q1=A chose pure transform with no Digest-model coupling

decision: Renderer performs no I/O (no file/network/LLM/state); result depends only on items + lookback_days
reasoning: user clarification Q1=A 'pure, no IO, transform data->string'; idempotency principle PROJECT_SPEC §7

decision: Renderer must not import osspulse.github/state/summarizer/cache
reasoning: architecture.md S2!=S4 boundary; mirrors summarizer AC-4-021 import-isolation

decision: output = pure function(input): re-rendering same items yields byte-for-byte identical string
reasoning: user Q3 insight 'deterministic renderer, output=f(input)'; idempotency PROJECT_SPEC §7

decision: Repos sorted alphabetically case-insensitive regardless of input order
reasoning: user clarification Q3=A; predictable ordering independent of upstream

decision: Item-type groups in fixed order Issues -> Discussions -> Releases (then Khac)
reasoning: user clarification Q3=A; PROJECT_SPEC §4 layout; future-proofs V2 at zero V1 cost

decision: Items within a group preserve input order (no re-sort)
reasoning: user clarification Q3=A; preserves upstream newest-first relevance

decision: Empty input returns a non-empty 'No new items in the last N days' Markdown doc with a title, no ## sections
reasoning: user clarification Q2=A 'never ambiguous output'

decision: Only repos with >=1 item get a ## section; empty groups/sections never emitted
reasoning: user clarification Q2=A 'chỉ render repo có items, không tạo section rỗng'

decision: Line format `- #{item_id} "{title}" — {summary} [link]({url})`; header `## {repo} — {lookback_days} ngày qua`; group `### {Label} ({count})`
reasoning: PROJECT_SPEC §4 example + user Q3=A worked example

decision: Empty title -> omit quoted title (no empty "")
reasoning: avoid ambiguous empty quotes; RawItem.title may be empty per cross-spec id 2; PROJECT_SPEC silent

decision: Empty url -> omit [link](...) suffix
reasoning: no dead links; RawItem.url may be empty; PROJECT_SPEC silent

decision: Empty summary -> omit '— summary' segment (no dangling em-dash)
reasoning: avoid 'title — . [link]'; design choice

decision: Unknown item_type bucketed under trailing '### Khác (N)' group, never dropped
reasoning: never lose an input item (AC-5-020); PROJECT_SPEC silent

decision: No Markdown escaping of title/summary in V1 (rendered as-is)
reasoning: output is trusted local human-read content; PROJECT_SPEC §4 shows raw text; escaping is future hardening

decision: Determinism rule: alphabetical repos (case-insensitive) + fixed type order + input order within group
reasoning: core of idempotency; output=f(input)

decision: No input item is ever omitted (except suppression of empty groups); duplicate ids both rendered (renderer does not dedupe)
reasoning: dedup is State Store's job; renderer faithfully renders given items (AC-5-009/020)

decision: Group labels locked: issue->'Issue mới', discussion->'Discussion', release->'Release', unknown->'Khác'
reasoning: PROJECT_SPEC §4 verbatim wording; locks A-A6/A-A7

decision: Empty title/url/summary degrade the line (omit segment), never raise; field text rendered as-is (no Markdown escaping in V1)
reasoning: dirty-data resilience (cross-spec id 2); A-A1/A-A2/A-A3/A-A4 locked as design decisions

decision: Integration seam = new DigestRenderer port; consumes SummarizedItem from S4 summarize_items(); returns str consumed by S6
reasoning: one new port, no existing Protocol changed; matches ports/adapters pattern
rejected: add render method to an existing Protocol

decision: Renderer never dedupes; duplicate item_ids both rendered; every input item appears exactly once
reasoning: dedup is State Store's job (state-store-3); renderer is a faithful transform

decision: All-empty-fields item renders as at least '- #{item_id}' without raising
reasoning: defensive rendering; renderer must never crash on dirty RawItem

decision: Renderer logic lives in a pure free function render(); MarkdownDigestRenderer class delegates to it (thin adapter). Digest model untouched.
reasoning: Mockless-testable as a plain function while preserving a role-named port for S6/S7 wiring; mirrors summarizer adapter style; honors user Q1=A (no Digest coupling, no IO).
rejected: class-only adapter with logic in method

decision: Add DigestRenderer(Protocol) to ports.py with a single method render(items, *, lookback_days) -> str; structural impl, keyword-only lookback_days. ports.py import gains SummarizedItem.
reasoning: Matches existing role-named Protocol ports (GitHubClient/LLMClient/Delivery); no inheritance; one new port, no existing Protocol changed (INT-5-001).
rejected: add render onto existing Delivery port

decision: Deterministic grouping via dict[repo]->dict[type]->list (insertion order); repos emitted via sorted(keys, key=str.lower); groups via fixed GROUP_ORDER constant then Khac; items in append/input order. No set anywhere.
reasoning: Eliminates set/dict-order leakage (RF-1 core risk); only repos are sorted (case-insensitive stable), items keep input order (AC-5-007); byte-for-byte determinism (AC-5-004).
rejected: collect repos/types into sets then sort

decision: Unknown item_type collapses into a single trailing ### Khac (N) group per repo, after issue->discussion->release, items in input order.
reasoning: Never drop an item (AC-5-020/BR-5-010); single bucket is simplest for V1 issues-only; matches glossary Khac bucket.
rejected: one Khac sub-group per distinct unknown type

decision: No openapi.yaml for this change (CLI-only, no inbound HTTP API); document the Python Protocol contract in design.md §API Design instead. Deliberate deviation from R5/R9.
reasoning: OSS Pulse has no HTTP API (conventions.md, project.md); INT-5-001 seam is a Python Protocol; precedent github-collector-2 ADR-007 + state-store-3 ADR-004.
rejected: author a stub openapi.yaml fabricating an HTTP surface

decision: Item line = '- #{item_id} "{title}" — {summary} [link]({url})' built by joining present segments with single spaces; empty title/url/summary omit their segment; repo header '## {repo} — {lookback_days} ngày qua'; group header '### {Label} ({count})'.
reasoning: AC-5-012/013/014 exact-string scenarios + AC-5-015/016/017 empty-field omission + BR-5-007/008.

decision: _build_item_line uses U+2014 em-dash (—) as the separator before the summary segment, matching BR-5-007 exactly. Tests use explicit character not escaped sequence.
reasoning: AC-5-012 byte-match requires the exact em-dash; the repo header also contains this character so AC-5-017 tests assert only on item lines (not the whole output) to avoid false matches.

decision: The empty-summary AC-5-017 tests inspect only item lines (`line.startswith('- #')`) rather than the full output to avoid false-positive matches against the em-dash in the repo header `## {repo} — N ngày qua`.
reasoning: The repo header uses the same em-dash; asserting `'—' not in result` would always fail. Using `_item_lines()` helper isolates the assertion correctly.
rejected: assert em-dash not in full output (incorrect)

decision: No new dependency was added. The renderer imports only `osspulse.models` and stdlib. The static import-isolation test (AC-5-003) confirms this.
reasoning: ADR-005 / design.md mandate stdlib-only for the render package. Zero new packages = zero supply-chain risk surface.

decision: S5 QA verdict: GO. 0 bugs. 20/20 ACs verified. 220/220 tests pass. 100% coverage on osspulse.render.
reasoning: All gate criteria met independently. Determinism confirmed (RF-1: byte-equality, adversarial shuffle, no set). Dirty-data resilience confirmed (RF-2: all combined empty-field permutations). EC-004 10k-item stress PASS. Security audit CLEAN. No new dependencies. qa/testcases.md produced (32 TC rows + 6 spot-checks).

decision: OBS (not a bug): em-dash in repo header creates false-positive risk for AC-5-017 test assertions on full output. Correctly mitigated by _item_lines() helper scoping. No action required.
reasoning: The repo header '## {repo} — N ngày qua' uses U+2014 em-dash; asserting em-dash absence on full output would always fail. Test correctly scopes to item lines starting with '- #'.

decision: OBS (not a bug): EC-004 has no permanent automated stress test. QA spot-check confirmed 10,000 items render correctly. Algorithm is O(N) single-pass with no scale-dependent branches.
reasoning: 10k-item spot-check: 10,000 item lines produced, output 377,237 chars, byte-equal double render. Non-blocking; no dedicated test needed for V1.

decision: Release digest-renderer-5 as a pure additive module (src/osspulse/render/ + DigestRenderer port). No DB migration, no new dependency, no API change. Deploy strategy: direct. Rollback: git revert merge commit. tests/qa_spot_checks_temp.py deleted (QA scratch file, not pytest-collected).
reasoning: S5 GO verdict (0 bugs, 20/20 ACs, 100% coverage). Renderer not yet wired into CLI pipeline — wiring is a follow-on change. Change archived via openspec archive after release.md written and final suite green (220/220).
